headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (April 19-25): Eli Lilly, Biogen Earnings On Tap, Sanofi Awaits FDA Decision
summary: Biotech stocks staged a nice recovery along with the broader markets in the week ended April 17.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Dropbox, Ford, Johnson & Johnson, Teladoc And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story examines the revolution in telehealth and virtual medicine.

Other featured articles ponder how well businesses will snap back from the crisis and discuss companies that are boosting dividends instead of cutting them.

headline: Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Caterpillar, Facebook, Microsoft And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 

Bullish calls included e-commerce, software and social media leaders.

Bearish calls included the iPhone maker and a top video streamer.

headline: Esports Group eFuse To Power $20,000 'Call Of Duty: Warzone' Charity Tournament Later Today
summary: Gaming and esports social media platform eFuse is partnering up with online tournament organizer Mainline to host the Fandom Warzone Charity Pro-Am. The "Call of Duty"  event is taking place on Sunday, April 19 at 4:30 pm EST/1:30pm PST.
